top_signals.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Unlocking business: reform driven by you
top_signals.summary: This questionnaire asks businesses large and small to tell government about regulation which is not fit for purpose and unjustifiably inhibits growth, innovation and investment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: A new approach to ensure regulators and regulation support growth
top_signals.summary: An action plan setting out the government's approach to regulation and regulators
